description:
One of the smallest LEP ("white laser") throwers ever made — a single white laser emitter in a 14500-sized body.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 165 lumens · **Throw:** 590 m · **Intensity:** 87,025 cd (Aluminum)
- **Power:** 6 W max · 1× 14500 Li-ion (excluded), rear forward clicky switch
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 100 × 22 × 19 mm · **Weight:** 62 g

**Materials:** Aluminum (this listing) and a **Titanium** variant — the Ti model is rated 300 lumens, 700 m throw, 122,600 cd, 90 g.

Dual light source LEP thrower — a white laser emitter plus six auxiliary LEDs that can run together.

- **Light source:** 1× White Laser Emitter (LEP) + 6× aux LEDs
- **Max output:** 250 lm LEP / 300 lm aux / **500 lm combo** · **Throw:** 1,056 m · **Intensity:** 279,000 cd
- **Power:** 12 W max · 1× 18350 (or 18650 via extension tube), excluded
- **Switch:** rear e-switch with RGB tail lights; Turbo-glow bezel and tail bars
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 96 × 32 × 25.5 mm · **Weight:** ~102 g

Two-in-one combo light pairing a high-performance LED with a white laser emitter (LEP) in a large 46950-cell body.

- **Light source:** High-performance LED + White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 12,100 lm LED / 300 lm LEP / **12,600 lm combo** · **Throw:** 520 m LED / **1,300 m LEP** · **Intensity:** 76,500 cd LED / 42,623 cd LEP
- **Power:** 88 W max · 1× 46950 Li-ion (3.7 V / 32,000 mAh) · up to 26 days runtime on Eco
- **Charging:** USB-C up to 4 A · power-bank out · battery indicator
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 72 × 52 × 163 mm · **Weight:** ~938 g (with battery)

High-output dual-LED thrower/flood (listed under Lumintop's LEP line, though it uses LEDs, not a laser).

- **Light source:** 1× Luminus SFT-40 (spot) + 8× Cree XHP-50.2 (flood) — switchable individually or together
- **Max output:** 1,800 lm spot / 26,000 lm flood / **27,000 lm combo** · **Throw:** 700 m · 5 output levels
- **Power:** 3× 21700 Li-ion button-top (excluded) · **Charging:** USB-C up to 4 A, USB-C power-bank out · LCD status display
- **Switch:** electronic side switch · tripod mount · battery-check & lock-out
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 68 × 51 × 153 mm · **Weight:** ~550 g (battery excluded)

Compact white-laser (LEP) thrower, the first of Lumintop's Thor LEP series.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 400 lumens · **Throw:** 1,200 m · **Intensity:** 34,200 cd
- **Power:** 9 W max · 1× 18350 Li-ion (excluded) · rear e-switch with RGB light
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 96 × 32 × 22.5 mm · **Weight:** 102 g (Aluminum)

**Materials:** offered in Aluminum and Titanium.

White-laser (LEP) thrower with a very tight, high-intensity beam.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 500 lumens · **Throw:** 1,800 m · **Intensity:** 769,500 cd
- **Power:** 9 W max · 1× 18350 or 18650 (via extension tube), excluded · rear e-switch with RGB light
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 41.5 × 28 × 118 mm (head × tube × length) · **Weight:** 125 g (Aluminum)

**Materials:** offered in Aluminum and Titanium.

Revised second-generation Thor II white-laser (LEP) thrower.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 350 lumens · **Throw:** 1,700 m · **Intensity:** 738,000 cd
- **Power:** 9 W max · 1× 18350 or 18650 (via long tube), excluded · rear e-switch with RGB light
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 41.6 × 28 × 106 mm (head × tube × length) · **Weight:** 115 g (Aluminum)

Ultra-compact white-laser (LEP) thrower, only 78 mm long.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 250 lumens · **Throw:** up to 700 m
- **Size:** 78 × 25 mm · night-light ring + Turbo-glow tail stripe

**Materials:** Aluminum (Black / Green) and Titanium.

Long-range white-laser (LEP) thrower with a large head — the longest-throwing light in the Thor LEP line.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 400 lumens · **Throw:** 2,500 m · **Intensity:** 1,562,500 cd
- **Power:** 9 W max · 1× 21700 or 18650 (excluded) · rear e-switch with RGB light
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 159.2 × 59.3 × 25.4 mm · **Weight:** 254 g (Aluminum)

Combo thrower pairing a white laser emitter with four Cree XP-L HI LEDs for both reach and flood.

- **Light source:** 1× White Laser Emitter (LEP) + 4× Cree XP-L HI LED
- **Max output:** 2,800 lm LED / 280 lm LEP / 2,750 lm combo · **Throw:** 1,170 m LEP / 202 m LED · **Intensity:** 342,000 cd LEP / 10,200 cd LED
- **Power:** 36.5 W max · 1× 21700 Li-ion (excluded) · **Charging:** USB-C up to 2 A, USB-C discharge
- **Switch:** backlit side e-switch · **Waterproof:** IP68 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 63.8 × 27.5 × 120 mm · **Weight:** ~200 g

Titanium white-laser (LEP) thrower in a short, stout body.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP)
- **Max output:** 370 lumens · **Throw:** 1,200 m · **Intensity:** 360,000 cd
- **Power:** 9 W max · 1× 18350 Li-ion (excluded) · rear e-switch with RGB light
- **Features:** lock-out, battery check, switch backlight can be turned off
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 92 × 34.5 mm · **Weight:** 215 g (Titanium)

Compact multi-source pocket light combining a white laser, a COB flood and a red light.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP) + white COB + red light
- **Max output:** 300 lm LEP / **600 lm flood combo** · **Throw:** 650 m · **Intensity:** 105,750 cd · up to 100 h on Moonlight
- **Power:** 15 W max · 1× 18650 (max 66.5 mm), excluded · **Charging:** internal waterproof USB-C
- **Features:** red aux light (night-vision friendly), tail magnet, side switch
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 (2 m) · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 30 × 24 × 118 mm · **Weight:** ~98 g

Very compact triple-source pocket light: white laser throw, COB flood and a red light.

- **Light source:** White Laser Emitter (LEP) + red & white COB
- **Max output:** 320 lm spot / **550 lm flood+spot combo** · **Throw:** 700 m · **Intensity:** 122,500 cd · up to 36 h on Eco
- **Power:** 15 W max · 1× 18350 Li-ion · **Charging:** internal waterproof USB-C
- **Features:** red light (night-vision friendly) with SOS, Turbo-glow accents
- **Waterproof:** IPX-8 · **Impact:** 1 m
- **Size:** 26 × 24 × 79 mm · **Weight:** ~88 g (with battery)

**Materials:** Aluminum and Titanium.
